objectives.name: 01 - homepage - RT
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.TSN) AND contains(request_attribute.LTN, "Astroshop")
| filter request_attribute.TSN == "01 - homepage"
| fieldsAdd duration = toDouble(duration) / 1000000 // NS to MS conversion
| summarize { median=round(median(duration), decimals:0)}

objectives.name: Failed requests
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "staging-astroshop"
| filter request.is_failed == true
| summarize totalErrorRequests = count()
| fields totalErrorRequests

objectives.name: Total Traces and Spans
objectives.description: This query calculates the sum of all traces and spans
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "staging-astroshop"
| summarize totalTraces = countDistinct(trace.id), totalSpans = count(), totalTracesAndSpans = countDistinct(trace.id) + count()
| fields totalTracesAndSpans

objectives.name: CPU throttling time
Max Memory usage in MB
CPU Max
Total amount Load Test Requests
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.TSN) 
| filter contains(request_attribute.LTN, "Astroshop")
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "staging-astroshop"
| summarize spans = count() | fields spans

objectives.name: Sum of 5XX requests
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "staging-astroshop"
| filter http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code < 600
| summarize totalErrorRequests = count()
| fields totalErrorRequests

objectives.name: Logs with errors
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "staging-astroshop"
| filter loglevel == "ERROR"
| summarize totalErrorLogs = count()
| fields totalErrorLogs
